text: Home services industry includes roofing, plumbing, HVAC, electrical, cleaning, landscaping, pest control, painting, flooring, and remodeling. Typical LP signals: free estimate, licensed & insured, local service area, years of experience, before/after photos, customer reviews. Visual strategy: Tangible Outcomes — show gleaming results, skilled craftsmen at work, transformed spaces. Value signals: reliable, professional, affordable, local, fast response.

B2B SaaS products include project management tools, CRM platforms, HR software, accounting tools, analytics dashboards, communication platforms, and developer tools. Typical LP signals: free trial, enterprise plan, integrations, API, team collaboration, productivity metrics, ROI. Visual strategy: Functional Clarity — clean editorial dashboard mockups, partial UI elements showing key features, no humans needed. Value signals: efficient, powerful, integrates with existing tools, scalable, secure.

E-commerce and retail covers consumer electronics, fashion, beauty, home goods, sporting goods, toys, and food products. Typical LP signals: free shipping, customer reviews, product specs, discount codes, easy returns, product imagery. Visual strategy: Tangible Engagement — natural everyday usage, texture and material quality, human interaction with product. Value signals: premium, desirable, quality, value, lifestyle.

Financial services include loans, credit cards, insurance, investment platforms, budgeting apps, and banking. Typical LP signals: APR, coverage types, no-fee, sign up bonus, trusted, FDIC insured, licensed. Visual strategy: depends — if app-based use Functional Clarity, if service use Tangible Outcomes with lifestyle imagery showing financial confidence. Value signals: trustworthy, secure, simple, beneficial.

Health and wellness spans fitness apps, supplements, telehealth platforms, dental/medical practices, mental health services, and medical devices. Typical LP signals: clinically proven, FDA approved, doctor recommended, free consultation, before/after results. Visual strategy: Visualizing Virtual Value for apps (show real-world health outcomes, device optional), Tangible Outcomes for physical services. Value signals: effective, trusted, simple, transformative.

Travel covers booking platforms, hotels, airlines, car rentals, travel insurance, and destination guides. Typical LP signals: best price guarantee, flexible cancellation, loyalty points, destination highlights. Visual strategy: Visualizing Virtual Value — show real destination environments and experiences vividly, device/screen optional and should not dominate. Value signals: experiential, affordable, flexible, inspiring.

Education includes online courses, tutoring platforms, certification programs, university programs, and skills training. Typical LP signals: self-paced, certificate, expert instructors, enrolled students count, job placement. Visual strategy: Visualizing Virtual Value (if platform) — show real-world skill application, laptop optional. Value signals: career-advancing, accessible, credible, practical.

Food and beverage covers meal delivery, restaurant chains, food subscription boxes, beverages, and specialty food products. Typical LP signals: fresh ingredients, delivery area, menu highlights, dietary options, customer favorites. Visual strategy: Tangible Engagement — natural food styling with human enjoyment, show texture, color, freshness. Value signals: delicious, fresh, convenient, indulgent.

Automotive includes car dealerships, auto repair, car insurance, ride-sharing platforms, and automotive parts. Typical LP signals: inventory, financing options, certified technicians, warranty, test drive. Visual strategy: Tangible Engagement for physical products, Tangible Outcomes for services. Value signals: reliable, powerful, value, trusted.

Legal and professional services include law firms, accounting, consulting, HR services, and marketing agencies. Typical LP signals: free consultation, years of experience, case results, certified, licensed. Visual strategy: Tangible Outcomes — show professionals in credible settings, office environments, confident client interactions. Value signals: expert, trustworthy, results-driven, responsive.
